metadata.title: JV Vogler — Frontend Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of JV Vogler, a frontend developer specializing in modern web technologies.

hero.heading: I'm a Frontend Developer
hero.paragraph: Hi! I am JV and I'm constantly learning and improving to deliver outstanding web experiences. Currently I love to work on web applications using technologies such as React, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and more.

about.heading: About Me
about.metaDescription: Learn more about JV Vogler — a frontend developer passionate about building great web experiences.

whoAreYou.question: Who are you?
whoAreYou.answer: I'm JV — a frontend developer based in Brazil. I'm passionate about building polished, user-friendly web applications and I'm always looking for the next thing to learn.

whatDoYouDo.question: What do you do?
whatDoYouDo.answer: I build web applications for a living. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and the modern frontend ecosystem. I also love tinkering with side projects, game dev experiments, and writing about what I learn.

howDidYouStart.question: How did you get into programming?
howDidYouStart.answer: I'm self-taught. I started by following free online courses and building small projects. Eventually things clicked, and I fell in love with the craft of turning ideas into interactive experiences.

whatTechDoYouUse.question: What technologies do you use most?
whatTechDoYouUse.answer: React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS are my daily drivers. I also enjoy working with Node.js, Framer Motion, and dabbling in Godot for game development.

whatAreYouLearning.question: What are you currently learning?
whatAreYouLearning.answer: I'm diving deeper into server components and the modern React ecosystem, exploring Rust for performance-critical tooling, and generally trying to level up my system design skills.

outsideCoding.question: What do you do outside of coding?
outsideCoding.answer: I enjoy playing video games (PC, console, mobile — anything really), reading, listening to music, and spending time daydreaming about future projects. I'm also a big fan of coffee.

favoriteSetup.question: What's your dev setup?
favoriteSetup.answer: Linux (Arch btw), VS Code with a whole bunch of extensions, fish shell, and a mechanical keyboard. Dark mode everything, obviously.

goal.question: What's your goal?
goal.answer: To keep growing as a developer, build things that people actually enjoy using, and share what I learn along the way through my blog and open-source contributions.
